race.comment: LET'S DO IT AGAIN (3) ran a nice race here first-up then floundered in heavy going at the Sunshine Coast last start. Has raced three times at this distance for two wins. Cherry ripe after two runs back and he finds the ideal scenario this evening. EFFIE'S JOY (10) began awkwardly and was never a factor at her latest appearance over 1540m on the poly track here. Has a fine record at this trip including placings at two out of three at this track. Drawn to play a significant role. WATERMELON (1) mixes his form. Went close under 62.5kgs here at this trip three back. Can win with a repeat of that effort. WAVERLEY (4) is open to plenty of improvement at the third run back over a bit more ground. The blinkers and tongue tie going on may be significant. ELEANOR NANCY (9) did a good job to finish third last start at Toowoomba in a stronger race than this. Up sharply in the weights but should be thereabouts.
